titles.text: みつめてナイトR 大冒険編

descriptions.text: The sequel to the dating simulation Mitsumete Knight, features a 2d isometric view RPG game and has some characters from the first game.

The story in this case changes and the player controls one of the kingdom's knights (called Christopher McCloud) that will join a group of 5 girls and starts a quest to find the cure for the king disease.
